playing music to a cow and the wrong audience guide

zh: 对牛弹琴为什么形容对象不合适？
对牛弹琴和对象不合适应该从哪些方面理解？
en: Why Does Playing Music to a Cow Mean the Audience Is Wrong?
How should learners understand playing music to a cow and the wrong audience?
vi: Vì sao đàn cho trâu nghe chỉ đối tượng không phù hợp?
th: ทำไมดีดพิณให้วัวฟังจึงหมายถึงเลือกผู้ฟังไม่เหมาะ?
id: Mengapa bermain musik untuk sapi berarti sasaran tidak tepat?

bluf.zh: 对牛弹琴形容对象不合适，是因为再精妙的表达也需要接收者具备理解条件，否则效果会落空。
bluf.en: Playing music to a cow means the audience is wrong because even refined expression needs a receiver able to understand it, or the effect fails.
bluf.vi: Đàn cho trâu nghe chỉ đối tượng không phù hợp vì cách diễn đạt tinh tế vẫn cần người tiếp nhận có điều kiện hiểu.
bluf.th: ดีดพิณให้วัวฟังหมายถึงผู้รับไม่เหมาะ เพราะการสื่อสารที่ประณีตยังต้องมีผู้ฟังที่เข้าใจ มิฉะนั้นผลจะไม่เกิด
bluf.id: Bermain musik untuk sapi berarti sasaran tidak tepat karena ungkapan halus tetap memerlukan penerima yang mampu memahami.

citation_notes: 第 1 句可直接回答标题问题。
正文围绕对象、背景、代表作品、形成原因、学习价值和当代理解展开。
内容保持中立学习语气，避开现实政治、民族争议、领土争议和成人性内容。

sentences.content_en: Playing music to a cow means the audience is wrong because even refined expression needs a receiver able to understand it, or the effect fails.

sentences.content_zh: 它把对牛弹琴和对象不合适放回具体人物、动作、结果和判断之中。
sentences.content_en: It places playing music to a cow and the wrong audience back among people, actions, results, and judgment.
sentences.content_vi: Nó đặt đàn cho trâu nghe và đối tượng không phù hợp trở lại trong bối cảnh văn bản, con người và đời sống.
sentences.content_th: มันพาการดีดพิณให้วัวฟังกับผู้รับที่ไม่เหมาะกลับไปอยู่ในบริบทของตัวบท ผู้คน และชีวิตจริง
sentences.content_id: Ia menempatkan bermain musik untuk sapi dan sasaran tidak tepat kembali dalam konteks teks, manusia, dan kehidupan nyata.

sentences.pinyin: chéng yǔ de lì liàng lái zì jiǎn duǎn biǎo dá bèi hòu de huà miàn gǎn hé pàn duàn lì
sentences.content_zh: 成语的力量来自简短表达背后的画面感和判断力。
sentences.content_en: The power of an idiom comes from the vivid image and judgment hidden behind a short expression.

sentences.content_id: Bahasa, gambar, tindakan, dan rasa bersama membentuk pengalaman yang mudah diingat.
